description: Style Note Pared down to the basics, this kurta from alma is just right for a layered boho chic or a simple off-to-college vibe. Add a splash of colourful jewellery for an interesting dimension. The simple silhouette and the minimal design details will balance the brighter accessories. Product Details Black kurta with a mandarin collar and a V-neckline, chest fabric button placket, has cap sleeves, white piping at the yoke, print on the shoulder and a vented hem  Material and Care Blended cotton Machine wash Wash dark colours separately Dry in shade Warm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
